name: Chocolate-Pecan Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Crumble the chocolate cookies to make about 2 cups of crumbs.
3. Combine the crumbs with the pecans and melted butter.
4. Press the mixture into a 9-inch pie pan, forming a high rim around the edges.
5. Bake for 10 minutes.
6. Cool.
